name: python3-distorm3
title: python3-distorm3
summary: powerful disassembler library for x86/AMD64 binary streams (Python3 bindings)
description:
powerful disassembler library for x86/AMD64 binary streams (Python3 bindings)
diStorm3 is a binary stream disassembler library project.
.
With diStorm3, no more parsing strings is needed. diStorm3 is really a
decomposer, which means it takes an instruction and returns a binary
structure which describes it rather than static text. This is great for
advanced binary code analysis.
.
This package provides the Python3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-distorm3 because powerful disassembler library for x86/AMD64 binary streams (Python3 bindings).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-distorm3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-distorm3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-distorm3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
